dependency_notes.native_extension_strategy: OpenPCDet setup.py declares CUDAExtension modules for iou3d_nms, roiaware_pool3d, roipoint_pool3d, pointnet2, bev_pool, and ingroup_inds. The CPU gold route records this boundary instead of claiming compiled native inference.
dependency_notes.fallback_strategy: The verifier loads the pinned PointPillar YAML, imports pcdet/utils/common_utils.py with a SharedArray stub, runs deterministic CPU voxelization, and executes pcdet/models/backbones_2d/map_to_bev/pointpillar_scatter.py on synthetic pillars.
dependency_notes.dataset_boundary: No KITTI asset or checkpoint is required for the gold artifact; agents attempting full inference must record dataset, checkpoint, spconv, and native NMS status.

checkpoint_strategy.reason: The CPU gold package verifies the detector config and voxel / BEV route without claiming KITTI checkpoint inference because OpenPCDet native CUDA extensions and spconv are outside this CPU fallback.
checkpoint_strategy.if_used_by_agent: Record checkpoint URL, cache path, checksum, dataset sample, config path, spconv version, and native NMS / ROI pooling status.
